mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_check ( product_id, system_quantity, actual_quantity, difference ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{systemQuantity}, #{actualQuantity}, #{difference} )
mapper.select: SELECT sc.id AS id, sc.product_id AS productId, p.product_code AS productCode, p.product_name AS productName, sc.system_quantity AS systemQuantity, sc.actual_quantity AS actualQuantity, sc.difference AS difference, sc.check_time AS checkTime FROM stock_check sc INNER JOIN product p ON p.id = sc.product_id ORDER BY sc.check_time DESC, sc.id DESC

SELECT sc.id AS id, sc.product_id AS productId, p.product_code AS productCode, p.product_name AS productName, sc.system_quantity AS systemQuantity, sc.actual_quantity AS actualQuantity, sc.difference AS difference, sc.check_time AS checkTime FROM stock_check sc INNER JOIN product p ON p.id = sc.product_id WHERE sc.id = #{id}
